zh.Stonor Park, Oxfordshire, England: 英國英格蘭奧可福爾斯頓
zh.lifeSummary: 當John Stoner於1280年出生在英國英格蘭奧可福爾亨莉時，他的父親Richard de Stonor III31歲，母親Margaret de Harnhull26歲。他於1303年之前與Maud FitzLewis在英國結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1354年在他的家鄉享年74歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Stoner于1280年出生在英国英格兰奧可福爾亨莉时，他的父亲Richard de Stonor III31岁，母亲Margaret de Harnhull26岁。他于1303年之前与Maud FitzLewis在英国结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1354年在他的家乡享年74岁。

nameMeanings.name: Stoner
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Sussex): topographic name from Middle English ston(e) ‘stone’ + -er, used for someone who lived by a prominent rock or stone, or perhaps who came from a place called Stone, although this formation is more rare. See Stone and compare Stoneman .
Americanized form (translation into English) of German   Steiner  .

variants.name: Stone
meanings: English: from Middle English ston(e) ‘stone, rock’ (Old English stān). The surname may be topographic, for someone who lived on stony ground, by a notable outcrop of rock, or by a stone boundary-marker or monument, or habitational, from a place called Stone, such as those in Buckinghamshire, Devon, Gloucestershire, Hampshire, Kent, Somerset, Staffordshire, and Worcestershire.
Irish (Kilkenny): adopted for Irish Ó Clochartaigh (see Clougherty ) and/or Ó Clochasaigh (see Clohessy ), and possibly several other names containing or thought to contain the element cloch ‘stone’.
Americanized form (translation into English) of various surnames in other languages, meaning ‘stone’, including Jewish Stein , Norwegian Steine, French Lapierre .

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

en.lifeSummary: When John Stoner was born in 1280, in Henley, Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Richard de Stonor III, was 31 and his mother, Margaret de Harnhull, was 26. He married Maud FitzLewis before 1303, in England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. He died in 1354, in his hometown, at the age of 74.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Stoner est né en 1280, à Henley, Oxfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Richard de Stonor III, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Margaret de Harnhull, avait 26 ans. Il a épousé Maud FitzLewis avant 1303, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé en 1354, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 74 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Stoner 1280 in Henley, Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Richard de Stonor III 31 und seine Mutter Margaret de Harnhull 26. Er hat vor 1303 in England Maud FitzLewis geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb 1354 im Alter von 74 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Stoner è nato il nel 1280 nel Henley, Oxfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Richard de Stonor III, aveva 31 anni e il suo madre, Margaret de Harnhull, aveva 26 anni. Lui sposato Maud FitzLewis prima del 1303, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1354, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 74 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: John Stonerが1280年にイギリスイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアヘンリーで生まれた時，父Richard de Stonor IIIは31歳，母Margaret de Harnhullは26歳であった。1303年以前にイギリスでMaud FitzLewisと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1354年に故郷で74歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: John Stoner(이)가 1280년 영국 잉글랜드 스퍼드실르 헨리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Richard de Stonor III(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret de Harnhull(은)는 26세였다. 그는 1303년 이전 영국에서 Maud FitzLewis(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1354년 그의 고향에서 74세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Stoner nasceu em 1280, em Henley, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Richard de Stonor III, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Margaret de Harnhull, tinha 26 anos. Ele casou-se com Maud FitzLewis antes 1303, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1354, em sua cidade natal, com 74 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Stoner родился в 1280 г. в местности хенли, оксфордшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Richard de Stonor III было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Margaret de Harnhull, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Maud FitzLewis перед 1303 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер в 1354 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 74 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Stoner nació en 1280, en Henley, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Richard de Stonor III, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Margaret de Harnhull, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Maud FitzLewis antes de 1303, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1354, en su pueblo, a la edad de 74 años.
